selections.name: Walk The Pier
selections.reason: Ready to peak second up after a solid return. Fitter for that run and looks well placed in this field.

selections.name: Omnic (NZ)
selections.reason: Classy type dropping in grade. Gets the inside draw and should get a soft run in transit.

selections.name: Frankie's Shout
selections.reason: Takes a significant class drop here. Has the ability to figure if he can reproduce his best form.

selections.name: Proclivity
selections.reason: Freshened up for this. Has shown enough ability to be competitive in a race of this nature.

danger_horse.name: Frankie's Shout
danger_horse.reason: The class drop is massive and he could easily blow this field away if right.

selections.name: Favour The Bold
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1. Back in class and maps to get all the favours in the run.

selections.name: Mrs Bull
selections.reason: Consistent mare who rarely runs a bad race. Gets a very suitable contest here.

selections.name: Interro
selections.reason: Lightly raced filly with plenty of upside. Wasn't far away last start and can improve.

selections.name: Extreme Merger
selections.reason: Honest type who will be running on strongly. Steps up to his pet distance.

danger_horse.name: Interro
danger_horse.reason: Has the profile of a rapid improver and could easily spike a big rating here.

selections.name: Just Joan
selections.reason: Set the pace last start and boxed on well. Will be prominent early and take plenty of catching.

selections.name: Cape Ex
selections.reason: First starter who trialed well. The inside barrier is a massive advantage over the 5f sprint trip.

selections.name: Nightwalker
selections.reason: Boxed on steadily last start. Drawn well and is a strong top three prospect.

selections.name: Step Quick
selections.reason: Resuming from a break. Has shown ability previously and can run a race fresh.

danger_horse.name: Cape Ex
danger_horse.reason: Unexposed first starter from a good yard with the gun draw. Could be anything.

selections.name: Flying Party
selections.reason: Has plenty of upside and looks ready to break through after a solid second last start.

selections.name: The Magnet
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1. Recent form is sound and should measure up well here.

selections.name: Six Kings
selections.reason: Strips fitter second up. Showed ability last preparation and can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Inyun
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed ability last prep and cannot be ruled out while fresh.

danger_horse.name: The Magnet
danger_horse.reason: Gets the dream run from the inside and has the figures to win this.

selections.name: Iowna Benz
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick and flying at present. Shows great will to win and is the one to beat.

selections.name: Panic (NZ)
selections.reason: Blinkers go on for the first time which could be a game changer. Definite winning chance.

selections.name: Rumours Abound
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. Will appreciate the drop in grade and 5f is her pet trip.

selections.name: Sutton Vella
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1. Can run a bold race fresh and has won first up previously.

danger_horse.name: Panic (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: The gear change (blinkers on) often sparks sharp improvement.

selections.name: Dark Thinker
selections.reason: Racing very well recently. Great chance to grab a well-deserved win in this field.

selections.name: Crown Legend
selections.reason: Down in class and gets the inside gate. Can improve sharply on recent runs.

selections.name: A Boy Named Soo
selections.reason: Racing consistently and must be respected despite the weight.

selections.name: Take The Chance
selections.reason: Back in form and is a chance on the quick five-day turnaround.

danger_horse.name: Crown Legend
danger_horse.reason: Class drop plus barrier 1 is a lethal combination.

selections.name: Sarrismo
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1. Third up and ready to peak after a strong win last start.

selections.name: Acheson
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick and flying at present. Hit a purple patch and will be hard to beat.

selections.name: Tenderize
selections.reason: Form in town is very strong. Should prove tough to beat in this grade.

selections.name: Glint Of Silver
selections.reason: Class runner who will appreciate the drop in grade despite the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Acheson
danger_horse.reason: Winning form is good form, and he is airborne right now.

selections.name: Written By Lucy
selections.reason: Third up and ready to win. Strong form this preparation and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Brogans Creek
selections.reason: Drawn well and cherry ripe third up. Profiles nicely for this.

selections.name: La Pelago
selections.reason: Drawn the inside and can improve sharply on recent efforts.

selections.name: Brief Statement
selections.reason: Class runner who will be running on strongly despite the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Brogans Creek
danger_horse.reason: Ready to peak third up and gets a great map from barrier 2.
